title:
Apply for a data.govt.nz publisher account
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Apply for a data.govt.nz publisher account
Adding datasets is easy and we will help you through every step of the way. All you have to do is apply for a publisher account below and we’ll work with you to add and manage datasets on data.govt.nz. You’ll want to make sure the data you want to list is Open Data.
Data.govt.nz is the central catalogue of Government Open Data in New Zealand including data from:
- Local and regional Government
- Tertiary education institutions
Other data releasing organisations can also apply for a publisher account - contact us to discuss your needs.
